creator: steffen@fritz.wtf
text:
I don't think that https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=271963 is the solution. The mentioned repository (I am also mentioning in this ticket, btw), is NOT the new repo of NBS System, it is the repo of an individual fork. As Naxsi is security related it would be NOT ok to just switch the repo url.


However, we need a solution for the problem. Who can take care of it and how?
